evals.prompt: add a zed task to run my tests with bun
evals.expected_output: Creates .zed/tasks.json with a test runner task using bun test, correct terminal settings

evals.prompt: I want to be able to start my Next.js dev server from Zed
evals.expected_output: Detects Next.js project, creates dev server task with use_new_terminal: true

evals.prompt: set up a format task for the current file using prettier
evals.expected_output: Creates formatter task with $ZED_FILE, reveal: never, allow_concurrent_runs: true
